features: YOUEON cylinder glass vase measures 4 inches/10 cm height by 8 Inches/20 cm width. Neither too big nor too small. Appropriate size is right for you to work your magic on it.
Lead Free & Heavy Duty Glass: This clear glass vase is crafted with lead free, heavy duty glass and a thick stable bottom. Clear appearance enable you to have a better look with the content inside.

Simple Modern Look: Cylinder vase is prevalent in modern times. It’s designed with the minimalist feel but practical in many ways. The glass flower vase for living room will bring color and nature into your home.

Multi-purpose Uses: The round clear glass cylinders can not only be used as flower vase for fresh flower or dried floral arrangement but also can commonly be used as candle holders, aquariums, hydroponic vase, miniature landscape or fish tanks and centerpieces decor that filled with decorative pebbles or lights.

Widely Application: Cylinder Vases can be applied to various occasions, like weddings, birthdays, celebrations and all kinds of events. You can also use it as a glass serving bowl in your kitchen, for example to hold vegetables, salads, fruit, cereals, sweets, nuts and other foods, for everyday use or grand occasions, easily holding the right amount of snacks.
